versions.version_description: Lots of chord changes and additions, removed some unnecessary spacing.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Title: It's gonna be me
Artist: *Nsync
Album: No Strings Attached
Year: 2000

Transcribed by: Greg Richards
contact info: iceman_greg@yahoo.com

--These are the chords from *Nsync's sheetmusic
songbook to "No Strings Attached"

Chords
N.C.    No chord
[ch]Gm[/ch]      355333
[ch]Ab[/ch]	466544
[ch]Bb5[/ch]	x133xx
[ch]Cm[/ch]	x35543
[ch]Gm[/ch]/[ch]Bb[/ch]	x1x033
[ch]Cm[/ch]/[ch]G[/ch]	2x4432
[ch]Fm7[/ch]	131111
[ch]Fm[/ch]	133111
[ch]Eb/G[/ch]	3x134x
[ch]G/B[/ch]	x2x033
[ch]Bb[/ch]	x13331
[ch]Bb/D[/ch]	xx0331
[ch]G7[/ch]	320001
[ch]Abmaj7[/ch]	4x554x
[ch]Bb[/ch](9)	6x353x


-Intro-
[tab]N.[ch]C[/ch].
        It's gonna be me    Oo--oh, yeah[/tab]

-Verse-
[tab]N.[ch]C[/ch].                     [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Bb5[/ch]
You mighta been hurt, babe, that ain't no lie.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]/[ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Cm[/ch]/[ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Bb5[/ch]
  You've seen them all come and go,       oh[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]/[ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]
I remember you told me  that it made you believe in[/tab]

[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
no man, no cry. Maybe that's why every little[/tab]


-Chorus-
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]Eb/G[/ch]          [ch]Cm[/ch]
thing I do  never seems enough for you. You don't[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
wanna lose it again, but I'm not like them.[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Bb6[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]
Baby, when you finally get to love somebody,[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb/D[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]G7[/ch]
guess what? It's gonna be me.[/tab]


-Bridge-
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]
There comes a day when I'll be the one, you'll see[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]G7[/ch]                           N.[ch]C[/ch].
(It's gonna, gonna, gonna, gonna.) It's gonna be me[/tab]

[tab][ch]Abmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]                [ch]Cm[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]
All that I do is not enough for you. Don't wanna lose[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Cm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
it, but I'm not like that. When finally you get to[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Bb/D[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch](9)
love-----, guess what? (Guess what?) Every little[/tab]


Verse2
You've got no choice, babe,
But to move on, you know
There ain't no time to waste,
'Cause you're just too blind to see.
But in the end you know it's gonna be me.
You can't deny
So just tell me why? Every little
(to chorus)


Happy playing
